CustomField.description: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. Auto-calculated. This formula checks if all amounts due from buyer (lines 101-112 on the HUD-1) are recorded correctly. For files with a value in "All Other Buyer Settlement Costs" (a field made obsolete in version 1.10), the formula is: Gross Amount Due from Borrower equals Purchase Price plus All Other Buyer Settlement Costs plus Pre-Paids/Reserves. For all other files, the formula is: Gross Amount Due from Borrower equals Purchase Price plus Settlement Charges to Borrower plus Other Amounts Due from Buyer.
CustomField.formula: IF(HOMEtracker__Gross_Amount_Due_from_Borrower__c > 0, IF(HOMEtracker__Settlement_Charges_to_Borrower__c <= 0 && HOMEtracker__Other_Amounts_Due_from_Buyer__c <= 0, IF((HOMEtracker__Gross_Amount_Due_from_Borrower__c - HOMEtracker__Purchase_Price__c - HOMEtracker__Prepaids_Reserves__c - HOMEtracker__All_Other_Buyers_Settlement_Costs__c == 0), "Yes", "No. Your numbers are off by $" & TEXT(ABS(HOMEtracker__Gross_Amount_Due_from_Borrower__c - HOMEtracker__Purchase_Price__c - HOMEtracker__Prepaids_Reserves__c - HOMEtracker__All_Other_Buyers_Settlement_Costs__c)) & ". Gross Amount Due from Borrower ($" & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Gross_Amount_Due_from_Borrower__c) & ') should equal Purchase Price ($' & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Purchase_Price__c) & ') plus Pre-Paids/Reserves ($' & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Prepaids_Reserves__c) & ") plus All Other Buyer's Settlement Costs (OLD) ($" & TEXT(HOMEtracker__All_Other_Buyers_Settlement_Costs__c) & '), which comes to $' & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Purchase_Price__c + HOMEtracker__Prepaids_Reserves__c + HOMEtracker__All_Other_Buyers_Settlement_Costs__c) & '. '), IF(HOMEtracker__Settlement_Charges_to_Borrower__c > 0, IF((HOMEtracker__Gross_Amount_Due_from_Borrower__c - HOMEtracker__Purchase_Price__c - HOMEtracker__Settlement_Charges_to_Borrower__c - HOMEtracker__Other_Amounts_Due_from_Buyer__c == 0), "Yes", "No. " & "Your numbers are off by $" & TEXT(ABS(HOMEtracker__Gross_Amount_Due_from_Borrower__c - HOMEtracker__Purchase_Price__c - HOMEtracker__Settlement_Charges_to_Borrower__c - HOMEtracker__Other_Amounts_Due_from_Buyer__c)) & ". Gross Amount Due from Borrower ($" & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Gross_Amount_Due_from_Borrower__c) & ") should equal Purchase Price ($" & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Purchase_Price__c) & ") plus Settlement Charges to Borrower ($" & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Settlement_Charges_to_Borrower__c) & ") plus Other Amounts Due from Buyer ($" & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Other_Amounts_Due_from_Buyer__c) & "), which comes to $" & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Purchase_Price__c + HOMEtracker__Settlement_Charges_to_Borrower__c + HOMEtracker__Other_Amounts_Due_from_Buyer__c) & ". "), "")), "No, enter the itemized amounts due from the Borrower, and the Gross Amount Due (Total Amount Due from Borrower).")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula checks if all amounts due from buyer (lines 101-112 on the HUD-1) are recorded correctly. Formula is different for old files that don't have a positive value in Settlement Charges to Borrower or Other Amounts Due from Buyer.
CustomField.label: Gross Amount Due Accounted For?
